mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_assessment_report WHERE risk_level IN ('HIGH', 'CRITICAL') AND assessment_date >= #{afterDate} ORDER BY assessment_date DESC
SELECT risk_level as riskLevel, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_assessment_report WHERE assessment_date >= #{startDate} GROUP BY risk_level

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(assessment_date, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(overall_score) as avg_score FROM t_assessment_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND assessment_date >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(assessment_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
